<!-- One or two sentences. What went wrong? -->


<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

```
<traceback or output>
```

## Environment

- Python version: <!-- `python --version` -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
